heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy and mild. Slight chance of a stray shower, highest over the taller peaks. Lows in the 50s to low 60s. South wind near 10 mph, gusting to 15 along Lake Champlain.

heading: Tuesday
text: Partly cloudy with a good chance of showers, and spotty thunderstorms. Hot and muggy. Highs in the 80s, with warmer valleys approaching 90. Southwest wind near 10 mph, gusting 15 to 20 over the higher hills.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: Partly cloudy south, mostly cloudy north. Increasing chance of rain showers, and stray thunderstorms. Warm. Lows in the 60s.
